title: Playground Console
concept: A dense console-style workspace that keeps the live WordPress preview visible while creation, saved management, Site Manager tools, and export actions live in a persistent command panel.
featureCoverage: Blueprint gallery with filters and search
Destructive reset and saved reload behavior
File browser with new file, new folder, upload, browse, and editor
Blueprint copy, download, run, and editor
Database driver, path, size, download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin

title: Playground Operations Desk
concept: A dense three-pane console that keeps creation sources, saved Playgrounds, the live WordPress frame, and Site Manager tools visible together instead of scattering core actions across separate overlays.

title: Playground Command Deck
concept: A split command-deck interface that keeps create, saved management, Site Manager, blueprint gallery, and portability workflows in one persistent workbench beside the live WordPress site.
focus: Persistent navigation instead of disconnected modal-first flows
High-density operational workbench for repeat Playground users
Live site context retained while managing files, settings, blueprints, database, and logs
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub with account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
edit WordPress, PHP, language, network, older versions, and multisite settings
communicate destructive reset and stored Save & Reload behavior
file browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs

focus: warm editorial accents with dense controls
